title: Add back arrow navigation from profile to hub

requirements.summary: Add a back arrow button in the ProfileView component that navigates to the hub page when clicked
acceptanceCriteria: A back arrow button is visible on the profile page
Clicking the back arrow navigates the user to the hub page
The back arrow is positioned appropriately in the ProfileView layout

file_operations.description: Add a back arrow button at the top of the ProfileView component that calls setCurrentView('hub') when clicked. Position the button using absolute or fixed positioning in the top-left area of the view, ensuring it's visible and accessible. Use an appropriate icon from lucide-react (e.g., ArrowLeft) and style it consistently with the app's design system.
